message:
feat(runtime): add capture scheduler anti-starvation and pane UUID recovery

Rewrite CaptureScheduler::select_panes to use a tiered anti-starvation
algorithm: panes split into High (priority <= 50) and Low (> 50) tiers,
with Low getting a guaranteed 20% floor of available slots. This prevents
low-priority panes (SSH, background) from being completely starved when
high-priority panes (Codex, Claude) saturate the capture budget.

Add stable UUID recovery during pane discovery: when a new pane is
detected, check storage for an existing record and adopt its UUID if
found. This prevents UUID drift across watcher restarts by preserving
the identity established during first observation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
